rulings.Case Title: LUCIANO COSLOVICH et al VS. AMCHEM PRODUCTS, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MARCH 10, 2008 LINE 1. DEFENDANT GEORGIA-PACIFIC, L.L.C.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. THE QUESTIONING OF PLAINTIFF WAS LIMITED AND RELIANCE ON OBJECTIONS TO INTERROGATORIES DOES NOT ESTABLISH THAT THE DISCOVERY IS FACTUALLY DEVOID. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: GILBERT VS THE ALLIANCE (UNDER SEAL)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Mtn To Dismiss Filed By Co Df Bart
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MARCH 10, 2008 LINE 2. DEFENDANT HARMON INDUSTRIES, INC.'S, (Joinder In) MOTION To Dismiss Filed By CO-DEFENDANT BART IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BASED ON THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS, GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 12654(A). BECAUSE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS BASED ON THE CALIFORNIA FALSE CLAIMS ACT, IT IS NOT A SHAM PLEADING AS A MATTER OF LAW. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Costs, Fees, And Sanction

rulings.Case Title: WALTER E MCLAUGHLIN VS. STEVE RUBENFAER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Reclassify Unlimited Jurisdiction Case To Limited Jurisdiction
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MARCH 10, 2008 LINE 8. DEFENDANTS STEVE RUBENFAER AND DAVITT FELDER'S Motion To Reclassify Unlimited Jurisdiction Case To Limited Jurisdiction IS DENIED. BY SEEKING A T.R.O., PLAINTIFF DID NOT ELECT SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE ALTHOUGH THAT APPEARS TO BE THE APPROPRIATE REMEDY AND SHOULD MINIMIZE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR DAMAGES. THE COURT MAY NOT CONSIDER THE SETTLEMENT OFFER WHEN ADDRESSING THE MERITS OF THE MOTION. =(302/PJM)
